project.name: graphquest
project.course: Building with LLMs — Dr. Yoram Segal
project.assignment: HW4 / EX04 — Reverse Engineering, Debugging and Token-Efficient Agentic AI

target.comment: The unfamiliar Python codebase under study. Primary: a single self-contained BugsInPy project whose many small modules make graph-guided navigation pay off. Finalize bug_id during Phase 1.

benchmark.comment: Both arms run the SAME model, task and stopping criterion. Only the retrieval policy differs (see docs/PRD_token_benchmark.md).
